countfromabove.com.name: Count from Above
countfromabove.com.summary: MLSaaS platform enabling organizations to build custom object detection models on satellite and drone imagery with no ML expertise, targeting B2B use cases like disaster response, mining, and infrastructure.

kesowa.com.name: Kesowa
kesowa.com.summary: Cloud-based drone data platform (ARU) offering AI-powered GIS, mission planning, change detection, and geospatial analytics for urban planners, city managers, and infrastructure teams.

yugmi.com.name: YugmiAI
yugmi.com.summary: AI-powered construction and infrastructure management platform combining document intelligence, computer vision, GIS, and agentic AI for site engineers and contractors.

magikkraft.com.name: MagikKraft
magikkraft.com.summary: AI-powered construction progress tracking platform using drones and 360° imagery to deliver real-time site visibility, defect detection, and analytics to developers and contractors.

viaskai.com.name: Viaskai
viaskai.com.summary: Drone-captured aerial imagery and AI platform that helps roofing, solar, and insurance contractors identify property damage and target sales opportunities before competitors.

constroai.com.name: ConstroAI
constroai.com.summary: AI and drone-based construction site management platform providing real-time insights, safety monitoring, and defect detection for construction operators.

trekz.ai.name: Trekz Incorporated
trekz.ai.summary: Drone and mobile mapping company delivering AI-powered 3D digital twins and survey-grade data for construction, infrastructure, and disaster recovery.

aeroyantra.com.name: Aeroyantra
aeroyantra.com.summary: Cloud-based drone survey intelligence platform that processes raw drone imagery into engineering deliverables (orthomosaics, point clouds, volume reports) for mining, construction, and engineering firms.

eyerod.com.name: eyerod
eyerod.com.summary: AI/computer vision SaaS platform for utility-scale solar projects, turning drone imagery and field data into actionable construction, quality, and asset intelligence.

fieldnerve.com.name: FieldNerve
fieldnerve.com.summary: GenAI-native agentic automation platform for infrastructure and construction teams, converting fragmented field data into real-time operational intelligence.

leap.tec.br.name: Leap Soluções em Tecnologia Ltda
leap.tec.br.summary: Builds Harpia, an AI/computer vision platform for automated corrosion detection, structural inspection, and thermographic analysis targeting oil, gas, mining, and utility industries.

visnetai.co.name: ViSNET A.I
visnetai.co.summary: Builds an AI-powered infrastructure intelligence platform using computer vision and drone automation for industrial and infrastructure inspections, sold B2B.

linkedin.com.name: ViSNET A.I
linkedin.com.summary: Builds an AI-powered infrastructure intelligence platform using computer vision and drone automation for industrial and infrastructure inspections, sold B2B.

skyvisor.ai.name: SkyVisor
skyvisor.ai.summary: SaaS platform for drone-based AI inspection and asset management of wind and solar farms, sold B2B to renewable energy operators.

ombrulla.com.name: Ombrulla
ombrulla.com.summary: Industrial AI platform (TRITVA, PETRAN) offering visual inspection, predictive maintenance, and connected-worker safety for asset-heavy industries via edge/cloud deployments.

vision-ais.com.name: Vision AIS, LLC
vision-ais.com.summary: Builds fit-to-purpose automated machine vision and AI inspection systems for industrial and oil & gas clients, combining hardware, sensors, and edge ML software.

spectx.nl.name: SpectX
spectx.nl.summary: Autonomous aerial X-ray inspection platform using synchronized drones and AI for structural defect detection in wind turbines, oil & gas, and infrastructure.

aplik.com.name: Aplik S.A.
aplik.com.summary: Develops computer vision and AI-based monitoring systems for mining and industrial operations (conveyors, leach pads, cathode inspection, cable monitoring), sold to mining and industrial operators.

clearwell.ai.name: Clearwell AI
clearwell.ai.summary: AI-native SaaS platform for tank asset lifecycle intelligence, serving inspection contractors and asset owners in water, oil & gas, and energy industries.

aegisvision.ai.name: AegisVision
aegisvision.ai.summary: AI-powered computer vision platform for real-time defect detection, quality assurance, and safety compliance monitoring sold to manufacturing, construction, energy, and other industrial sectors.

ivosystems.com.name: IVO Systems
ivosystems.com.summary: B2B SaaS operations platform for heavy civil contractors, managing equipment tracking, field timecards, maintenance, dispatch, and inspections.

fieldwire.com.name: Fieldwire by Hilti
fieldwire.com.summary: Jobsite management SaaS platform connecting field and office teams for construction contractors, now owned by Hilti.

prostarcorp.com.name: PointMan by ProStar
prostarcorp.com.summary: Cloud/mobile SaaS platform for capturing and managing above/below-ground utility infrastructure data, sold to utility companies, surveyors, municipalities and construction firms.

virtual-surveyor.com.name: Virtual Surveyor
virtual-surveyor.com.summary: SaaS platform that turns drone/point-cloud survey data into CAD terrain models, volumes and reports for surveyors, engineers, contractors and quarry operators.

onstationapp.com.name: OnStation
onstationapp.com.summary: Mobile SaaS platform for digital stationing and real-time documentation on road construction sites, sold to civil engineering and heavy highway contractors.

civilmesh.com.name: Civil Mesh Pro
civilmesh.com.summary: A civil engineering services firm providing aerial mapping, photogrammetry, surveying, and earthwork takeoff consulting to contractors and developers.

fulcrumapp.com.name: Fulcrum
fulcrumapp.com.summary: AI-powered field data collection and process management platform for frontline/field operations teams, with geospatial and agentic AI capabilities.

metafield.com.name: MetaField
metafield.com.summary: Cloud-based SaaS platform for construction materials testing, geotechnical engineering, and inspection firms, unifying field data collection, lab testing, and reporting.

operix.com.name: Operix
operix.com.summary: Field operations SaaS platform for specialty contractors (mechanical, electrical, HVAC, plumbing) covering scheduling, dispatch, invoicing, and accounting integrations.
